species.citation: Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind., Eerste Bijv. (1861) 336 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 119; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1,4 (1953) 383; Raganas et al., Biodiversitas 26 (2025) 1194.
species.distribution: Borneo, Moluccas, New Guinea, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra. LUZON: Apayao (photos), Isabela (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Davao del Norte, Lanao del Norte (photos), Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO (photos), PALAWAN.
